title: Davos, Graubünden — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Davos, Graubünden: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Davos is a city in Graubünden with a population of 11,000. The highest town in the Alps and host of the annual World Economic Forum, a world-class ski resort with year-round outdoor activities and a renowned health clinic.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
